sections.paragraph: fut. יַעֲמֹל to labour, especially with toil and weariness, to toil, Pro 16:26 Psa 127:1. Followed by בְּ to labour upon any thing, Jon 4:10 Ecc 2:21.- Ecc 1:3, בְּכָל־עֲמָלֹו שֶׁיַּעֲמֹלּ “of all the toil with which he toils.” Ecc 2:20 5:17 . (Arab. عَمِلَ to labour, to make). Hence-
